overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character exploring ancient stone temple ruins in a desert environment. The character walks through open courtyards and narrow passages between large weathered monolithic structures under bright sunlight, with controller UI visible at the bottom of the screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient temple courtyard with scattered monoliths

events.description: character enters narrow passage between tall stone walls

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily through open temple courtyard toward large central monolith

entered.detail: tall weathered stone wall forming the left boundary of the courtyard
massive dark stone spire with carved surfaces rising in the center of the area
broken stone blocks and rubble scattered across the ground
distant palm trees visible above the stone walls in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit open courtyard surrounded by ancient stone ruins. A massive central monolith dominates the view ahead, with scattered rubble and distant palm trees visible. The ground is covered in gravel as the character approaches a narrow gap between two large stone structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon passage between high stone walls

events.description: character exits narrow canyon into open ruins area

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily through the winding narrow canyon passage

entered.detail: tall vertical stone wall forming the left side of the narrow passage
tall vertical stone wall forming the right side of the narrow passage
uneven dirt and rock ground surface of the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The character traverses a long narrow canyon passage with high stone walls towering on both sides. The sky is visible only as a narrow strip overhead. The ground is rocky and uneven as the character walks toward a distant opening at the end of the canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open ruins area with stone platforms

events.description: character turns right to navigate through the ruins

agents.ego_description: character exits the canyon and turns right to explore the open ruins area

entered.detail: raised flat stone platform with weathered surfaces
broken walls and collapsed structures of ancient buildings
open gravel area illuminated by bright sunlight

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow canyon, the character enters a sunlit open area with different ancient ruins and stone platforms. The character turns right to navigate through the ruins, passing by weathered stone structures and broken columns scattered across the gravel ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, sunlit courtyard through a restrictive stone corridor and back into an expansive ruin. It begins with the character walking across a gravel courtyard toward a massive central monolith, passing scattered rubble and distant palm trees. As the character reaches a narrow gap between two large stone structures, the scene shifts into a long canyon passage where towering walls block the view, leaving only a thin strip of sky overhead. The camera then follows the character across the uneven rocky ground toward a distant light, finally emerging from the canyon into a new open area. The environment expands once more as the character turns right to navigate through a field of weathered stone platforms and broken columns under the bright sun.
